about.title: About me
content: Jona is a software developer specialized in web applications, with a solid focus on backend and experience in the fintech sector. He combines a rigorous technical mindset with strategic vision, prioritizing code quality, solution scalability, and delivery of tangible results.

His work is supported by methodologies like TDD and the use of artificial intelligence tools to optimize processes and development workflows. He masters modern technologies like .NET, TypeScript, React, Astro, Tailwind, and infrastructure tools like Docker, Terraform, Google Cloud Platform, and Cloudflare Workers.

His daily work revolves around automation, continuous improvement, and effective collaboration in technical teams that value innovation and best practices. Beyond his technical work, Jona enjoys mentoring and advising startups and small businesses, helping them structure technological strategies and empower their teams.
With an intermediate level of English and clear, assertive communication, he brings a balanced combination of technical knowledge, human leadership, and results orientation.
